grid.board: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-5 min-h-[70vh] items-start gap-4

board_shell.structure: A full-width flex container. Top contains KPI strip and controls. Bottom is a horizontally scrolling (or grid if fits) area for 5 columns.
board_shell.background: Deep slate #090E17 with an absolute positioned subtle noise overlay (opacity-20) to kill digital flatness.

kpi_strip.design: Bento-style thin strip. 4 key metrics. Use glassmorphism 'Crystal' surface style (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#101825]/70) with 1px border-slate-700/30.

kanban_column.header: Sticky top, bg-[#101825]/90 backdrop-blur-md, py-3 px-1. Must contain column name, patient count badge, and a subtle top-border accent matching the severity color.
kanban_column.body: Flex col, gap-3, min-h-[500px], pb-20 (for drop zone padding).

patient_card.surface: Solid bg-[#131D2B], rounded-lg, border border-slate-800. No shadow by default.
patient_card.hover_state: -translate-y-[2px] border-slate-600 shadow-xl transition-all duration-200. Cursor grab.
patient_card.severity_indicator: Instead of coloring the whole card, use a 3px left border (`border-l-[3px]`) mapped to the severity accent color, plus a subtle gradient fade on the left edge (`bg-gradient-to-r from-[severity-color]/10 to-transparent`).

layout.header: Flex justify-between items-start. Left: Avatar + Name + Age. Right: Severity Badge + Live Pulse (if active).
layout.body: Vitals mini-chips (Heart Rate, BP, SpO2) using JetBrains Mono for exact clinical precision.
layout.footer: Flex justify-between items-center mt-4. Clinician Avatar, Last Update Time (text-[10px]), Review Date.

live_indicator.design: Flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-500/10 border border-emerald-500/20
live_indicator.animation: Animate a 4px dot with `ping` and `pulse` to signify WebSocket real-time connection.

drag_over_state.design: When column is hovered during drag: bg-[#152030]/50 border-2 border-dashed border-slate-600 rounded-xl

drawer.design: Slide out from right. bg-[#0B121C] border-l border-slate-800. Glassmorphic overlay for the backdrop (`backdrop-blur-sm bg-black/40`).
drawer.content: Full timeline, complex charting for vitals history, extensive notes.

motion.card_drag: Scale down slightly (scale-95), rotate 2deg, opacity-90 during drag.
motion.live_update: When a card updates via WebSocket, flash a subtle background color of the severity for 1s, then fade to default.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (cards, buttons, columns) MUST use data-testid. Examples: `data-testid='patient-card-{id}'`, `data-testid='column-stable'`

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or 'Space Grotesk' fonts. Use Manrope for headings/KPIs, IBM Plex Sans for UI text, and JetBrains Mono for vitals/numbers.
Ensure dark mode is purely enforced. Do not use generic Shadcn white cards.
For the Kanban, use `@hello-pangea/dnd` or `dnd-kit` for drag and drop functionality.
The card color MUST NOT be a full flooded background. Use a left-border accent and a subtle transparent gradient overlay starting from the left edge.
KPI Strip should use the 'Crystal' Glassmorphism surface strategy (high blur, subtle border, no muddy grays).
Implement the 'live_indicator' in the top right of the board shell to show WebSocket connection status.
Avatars must use `lucide-react` user icons if image is missing, or the provided unsplash URLs.
For icons use `lucide-react`. No emojis whatsoever.
Use standard Tailwind grid layouts for the 5 columns to ensure they don't break. Use `min-w-[300px]` per column to enforce horizontal scrolling if the screen is too small.
Make sure contrast meets AA standards. The severity text colors provided are calibrated for dark backgrounds.
